prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VW Group EA888 Gen 3 2.0 TSI (CJXB/CJXC) with forged internals (Mahle Motorsport pistons, Manley H-beam connecting rods, ARP head studs) and a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbo** (hybridized with a billet compressor wheel, 0.63 A/R turbine housing) for 450+ HP on E85, paired with a **034 Motorsport billet crankshaft pulley** and **IE Stage 2+ high-pressure fuel pump**

Custom **ECU calibration via APR Stage 3+ software (specific to CJXB/CJXC with 4Motion Haldex integration)** optimized for 30+ psi boost, **NGK 97506 Iridium IX spark plugs (gapped at 0.022")**, and a **PTP Motorsport catch can system** to mitigate crankcase pressure under high load

Full drivetrain reinforcement: **02M 6-speed DSG transmission with a South Bend Stage 3+ clutch pack, upgraded mechatronics (TCU tuned via DQ250-specific Alientech K-Suite), and a **Quattro GmbH rear differential with 40% lockup** for improved torque vectoring, paired with **Neuspeed 25mm rear anti-roll bar** and **H&R Sport Springs (20mm drop) with Koni STR.T coilovers (rebound-adjustable)**
estetica: Full **SEAT Sport by Abarth widebody conversion kit (OEM+ homologated for TÜV)** with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap (Xpel PPF on front bumper, hood, and mirrors)**, **OEM SEAT Cupra R front lip (painted in Satin Black)**, and **custom 3D-printed rear diffuser with integrated LED fog light delete (replaced with **Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs**)

**BBS CH-R 9.5x20" ET35 forged wheels (custom concave design, 5x112 PCD) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect tires (255/35/20 front, 285/30/20 rear)**, paired with **AP Racing 355mm front brake kit (6-piston calipers, two-piece rotors) and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for track use

**Custom interior overhaul: **Recaro Pole Position seats (retrimmed in **Alcantara with red stitching, OEM SEAT Cupra R headrests**), **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede, with integrated **Aim Solo 2 DL GPS lap timer**), and **custom rear seat delete (replaced with a **Full Race Motorsports 3.5-gallon surge tank and **Radium Engineering fuel cell** for E85 compatibility)
